opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: Phone-only contact with no booking tools detected on site or GMB.
opportunities.observation: Boise customers searching after hours cannot book, sending leads to competitors.
opportunities.fix: Deploy AI chat widget with 24/7 self-scheduling tied to technician availability.

opportunities.label: Call Capture CRM
opportunities.signal: No CRM or marketing tools detected; phone-only contact is the sole inbound channel.
opportunities.observation: Every unbooked or missed call leaves zero record, losing revenue with no follow-up possible.
opportunities.fix: Implement AI call transcription and auto-CRM logging to capture every inbound lead.

opportunities.label: Maintenance Reminder Automation
opportunities.signal: Seasonal HVAC business in Boise with no email marketing or automation tools detected.
opportunities.observation: Boise's cold winters and hot summers create prime seasonal tune-up demand going untapped.
opportunities.fix: Automate seasonal SMS and email reminders to past customers before peak heating and cooling seasons.
